promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch after the v0.2 bridge-ordering reduction because v0.3 is the compact cleanup checkpoint for the Axis-0 options family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the compact measurement center, the changed option mix, and the explicit nondecision wall needed for a bounded second-pass reduction.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Earlier Axis-0 A2-mid batches were used as anchors so the v0.3 pass could preserve cross-version deltas instead of rebuilding the older menu and bridge scaffolding.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until the v0.3 cleanup checkpoint was reduced into a smaller reusable packet.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The v0.3 parent batch plus the existing Axis-0 A2-mid comparison anchors were sufficient to isolate the cleanup deltas and preserved contradictions for this pass.

candidate_items.name: SEMANTIC_ANCHOR_WITH_PROPOSAL_ONLY_MATH_BOUNDARY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest anti-overclaim wrapper in the v0.3 cleanup packet.

candidate_items.name: MINIMAL_PERTURBATION_RESPONSE_MEASUREMENT_SETUP
candidate_items.why_candidate: Isolates the cleanest compact operational statement of the Axis-0 measurement problem.

candidate_items.name: PAIRWISE_SPREAD_EFFECTIVE_LINK_COUNT_KERNEL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the direct semantic-fit center of the v0.3 menu without claiming finality.

candidate_items.name: V03_OPTION_REDIRECTION_WITH_GLOBAL_FALLBACK_BOUNDARY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the real version delta in the option family while keeping the semantic caveat on total correlation visible.

candidate_items.name: PATH_ENTROPY_AND_GLOBAL_ORDER_PARAMETER_NON_TIME_ROUTE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the compact v0.3 path-statistics bridge while preserving the non-time boundary.

candidate_items.name: EXPLICIT_NONDECISION_AND_NONREPLACEMENT_WALL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest boundary rule in the v0.3 family cleanup and keeps the cross-version limit explicit.

quarantined_items.name: CANON_ANCHOR_AS_FULL_FILE_RATIFICATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The heading cannot self-ratify the full v0.3 menu because the file explicitly keeps the mathematization proposal-side.

quarantined_items.name: TOTAL_CORRELATION_AS_PERFECT_AXIS0_SEMANTIC_MATCH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Total correlation remains a global fallback and does not perfectly track where correlation lives.

quarantined_items.name: PATH_ENTROPY_OR_G_SCALAR_AS_PRIMITIVE_TIME_FINAL_INVARIANT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The v0.3 route is operational and non-time; primitive-time or final-invariant readings overreach the source.

quarantined_items.name: V03_AS_TOTAL_REPLACEMENT_FOR_V02_BRIDGE_SCAFFOLDING
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The cleanup packet is useful, but it drops shell-bookkeeping and ratchet-order surfaces that still matter for family context.

quarantined_items.name: COMPACT_MENU_AS_SETTLED_AXIS0_WINNER
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Compactness and cleanup do not settle the winning Axis-0 implementation.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest v0.3 cleanup deltas without recreating the older Axis-0 bridge packets.
They keep cross-version lineage explicit while preserving the compact measurement center and nondecision wall.
They remain proposal-side, noncanon, and reusable for later comparison work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain overreads or premature closure moves rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to isolate them as boundary risks, but not to promote them into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used prior Axis-0 A2-mid packets only as comparison anchors to keep this pass small and cross-version aware.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded v0.3 cleanup reduction pass.
